_comment: Blackout product catalog — edit this file then run: npx tsx scripts/seed-products.ts

_instructions.adding_a_product: Copy an existing product block, change the fields. Sizes/prices go in the 'prices' array.
_instructions.adding_a_size: Add a new object to the 'prices' array with size and price_cents.
_instructions.images: Upload product images to any public URL (Stripe will host them). Use an array of URLs.
_instructions.sport: Tag every product with a sport: 'pickleball', 'tennis', etc. Used for shop filtering.
_instructions.one_size_products: For hats/accessories, use a single price with size 'One Size'.

products.name: Blackout Performance Tee
products.description: Premium court-ready tee — 85% Polyester / 15% Spandex. Breathable 4-way stretch, moisture-wicking. Designed for peak performance on and off the court.

products.name: Blackout Hoodie
products.description: Warm-up in style. Premium cotton blend hoodie with Blackout Pickleball branding. Perfect for pre-match warm-ups and post-match celebrations.

products.name: Blackout Cap
products.description: Rep the brand on and off the court. Adjustable snapback with embroidered Blackout logo. One size fits most.

products.name: Blackout Performance Shorts
products.description: Lightweight performance shorts with side pockets. Perfect for tournament play. Quick-dry fabric keeps you cool under pressure.
